title: COUNSELING CENTER - 211info
text: ENFOQUE DE LA FAMILIA COUNSELING CENTER COUNSELING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides culturally-specific counseling with a focus on the Hispanic and Latino community for substance use, anger management, and/or domestic violence. Services are provided through group classes, family, individual, or marriage counseling, one-on-one problem-solving, and family activities. 205 SE 3rd Street Suite 200 Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Counseling: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Groups and classes: vary on weekday evenings (503) 681-4870 Get Directions Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 681-4870 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information about upcoming classes FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah and Washington Counties Services: Anger Management * Hispanic/Latino Community Family Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community Individual Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community Marriage and Relationships Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community Spouse/Intimate Partner Abuse Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community Substance Use Disorder Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ENFOQUE DE LA FAMILIA COUNSELING CENTER
